mapper.select: SELECT FROM series WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0

SELECT FROM series WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO series (title, slug, description, cover_image_url, category_id, is_completed, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_delelte) VALUES (#{title}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{categoryId}, #{isCompleted}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE series
title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, category_id = #{categoryId}, is_completed = #{isCompleted}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0
UPDATE series SET is_delelte = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
